zone_specs:
Shared rectangular footprint W=15.00 m by D=8.00 m, world origin at the southwest inner corner (x increases east, y increases north). Floor heights from the four facade left chains: F1=3.60 m, F2=3.60 m, F3=4.80 m. Floor finished-floor levels: z_F1=0.00, z_F2=3.60, z_F3=7.20. Total building height 12.00 m. All zones are enumerated explicitly below, floor by floor, with no template compression. Every floor's zone footprints together exactly cover the shared 15x8 footprint with no gaps and no overlaps.

Floor 1 (7 zones, ceiling_height=3.60, z_floor=0.00). y-chain on F1 is 3.00|2.00|3.00 so ys_F1=[0.00,3.00,5.00,8.00]. xs_F1 south row is 5.00|5.00|5.00 = [0,5,10,15], xs_F1 north row is 5.00|5.00|5.00 = [0,5,10,15], corridor strip spans full x.
- Zone_F1_S1: office, x in [0.00, 5.00], y in [0.00, 3.00], area 15.00 m2, z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on south and west; interior north neighbor Zone_F1_COR; interior east neighbor Zone_F1_S2.
- Zone_F1_S2: office, x in [5.00, 10.00], y in [0.00, 3.00], area 15.00 m2, z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on south; interior north neighbor Zone_F1_COR; interior east neighbor Zone_F1_S3; interior west neighbor Zone_F1_S1.
- Zone_F1_S3: office, x in [10.00, 15.00], y in [0.00, 3.00], area 15.00 m2, z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on south and east; interior north neighbor Zone_F1_COR; interior west neighbor Zone_F1_S2.
- Zone_F1_COR: corridor, x in [0.00, 15.00], y in [3.00, 5.00], area 30.00 m2, z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on east and west; interior south neighbors Zone_F1_S1+Zone_F1_S2+Zone_F1_S3 split at x=5 and x=10; interior north neighbors Zone_F1_N1+Zone_F1_N2+Zone_F1_N3 split at x=5 and x=10.
- Zone_F1_N1: office, x in [0.00, 5.00], y in [5.00, 8.00], area 15.00 m2, z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on north and west; interior south neighbor Zone_F1_COR; interior east neighbor Zone_F1_N2.
- Zone_F1_N2: office, x in [5.00, 10.00], y in [5.00, 8.00], area 15.00 m2, z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on north; interior south neighbor Zone_F1_COR; interior east neighbor Zone_F1_N3; interior west neighbor Zone_F1_N1.
- Zone_F1_N3: office, x in [10.00, 15.00], y in [5.00, 8.00], area 15.00 m2, z_floor=0.00, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on north and east; interior south neighbor Zone_F1_COR; interior west neighbor Zone_F1_N2.

Floor 2 (8 zones, ceiling_height=3.60, z_floor=3.60). y-chain on F2 is 3.00|2.00|3.00 so ys_F2=[0.00,3.00,5.00,8.00]. xs_F2 south row is 5.00|5.00|5.00 = [0,5,10,15], xs_F2 north row is 3.75|3.75|3.75|3.75 = [0,3.75,7.50,11.25,15], corridor strip spans full x.
- Zone_F2_S1: office, x in [0.00, 5.00], y in [0.00, 3.00], area 15.00 m2, z_floor=3.60, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on south and west; interior north neighbor Zone_F2_COR; interior east neighbor Zone_F2_S2.
- Zone_F2_S2: office, x in [5.00, 10.00], y in [0.00, 3.00], area 15.00 m2, z_floor=3.60, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on south; interior north neighbor Zone_F2_COR; interior east neighbor Zone_F2_S3; interior west neighbor Zone_F2_S1.
- Zone_F2_S3: office, x in [10.00, 15.00], y in [0.00, 3.00], area 15.00 m2, z_floor=3.60, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on south and east; interior north neighbor Zone_F2_COR; interior west neighbor Zone_F2_S2.
- Zone_F2_COR: corridor, x in [0.00, 15.00], y in [3.00, 5.00], area 30.00 m2, z_floor=3.60, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on east and west; interior south neighbors Zone_F2_S1+Zone_F2_S2+Zone_F2_S3 split at x=5 and x=10; interior north neighbors Zone_F2_N1+Zone_F2_N2+Zone_F2_N3+Zone_F2_N4 split at x=3.75, 7.50 and 11.25.
- Zone_F2_N1: office, x in [0.00, 3.75], y in [5.00, 8.00], area 11.25 m2, z_floor=3.60, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on north and west; interior south neighbor Zone_F2_COR; interior east neighbor Zone_F2_N2.
- Zone_F2_N2: office, x in [3.75, 7.50], y in [5.00, 8.00], area 11.25 m2, z_floor=3.60, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on north; interior south neighbor Zone_F2_COR; interior east neighbor Zone_F2_N3; interior west neighbor Zone_F2_N1.
- Zone_F2_N3: office, x in [7.50, 11.25], y in [5.00, 8.00], area 11.25 m2, z_floor=3.60, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on north; interior south neighbor Zone_F2_COR; interior east neighbor Zone_F2_N4; interior west neighbor Zone_F2_N2.
- Zone_F2_N4: office, x in [11.25, 15.00], y in [5.00, 8.00], area 11.25 m2, z_floor=3.60, ceiling_height=3.60. Exterior on north and east; interior south neighbor Zone_F2_COR; interior west neighbor Zone_F2_N3.

Floor 3 (4 zones, ceiling_height=4.80, z_floor=7.20). y-chain on F3 is 3.00|2.00|3.00 so ys_F3=[0.00,3.00,5.00,8.00]. xs_F3 south row is 7.50|7.50 = [0,7.5,15], xs_F3 north row is a single span [0,15], corridor strip spans full x.
- Zone_F3_S1: office, x in [0.00, 7.50], y in [0.00, 3.00], area 22.50 m2, z_floor=7.20, ceiling_height=4.80. Exterior on south and west; interior north neighbor Zone_F3_COR; interior east neighbor Zone_F3_S2.
- Zone_F3_S2: office, x in [7.50, 15.00], y in [0.00, 3.00], area 22.50 m2, z_floor=7.20, ceiling_height=4.80. Exterior on south and east; interior north neighbor Zone_F3_COR; interior west neighbor Zone_F3_S1.
- Zone_F3_COR: corridor, x in [0.00, 15.00], y in [3.00, 5.00], area 30.00 m2, z_floor=7.20, ceiling_height=4.80. Exterior on east and west; interior south neighbors Zone_F3_S1+Zone_F3_S2 split at x=7.5; interior north neighbor Zone_F3_N1 over the full corridor x span.
- Zone_F3_N1: office_open_plan, x in [0.00, 15.00], y in [5.00, 8.00], area 45.00 m2, z_floor=7.20, ceiling_height=4.80. Exterior on north, east and west; interior south neighbor Zone_F3_COR over the full span x in [0.00, 15.00].

Floor coverage check: F1 zones union = [0,15]x[0,8] = 120 m2; F2 zones union = 120 m2; F3 zones union = 120 m2. No voids, no overlaps. Total conditioned floor area = 360 m2 which matches the case header.
material_specs:
Use standard EnergyPlus office defaults. Six opaque materials and one simple glazing material are required:
- Mat_ExtWall_Concrete (standard material): thickness=0.20 m, conductivity=1.31 W/m-K, density=2240 kg/m3, specific_heat=900 J/kg-K, roughness=MediumRough, thermal_absorptance=0.9, solar_absorptance=0.7, visible_absorptance=0.7.
- Mat_ExtWall_Insulation (no-mass material): thermal_resistance=2.0 m2-K/W, roughness=MediumRough, thermal_absorptance=0.9, solar_absorptance=0.7, visible_absorptance=0.7.
- Mat_IntWall_Gypsum (standard material): thickness=0.025 m, conductivity=0.16 W/m-K, density=800 kg/m3, specific_heat=1090 J/kg-K, roughness=MediumSmooth.
- Mat_Roof_Concrete (standard material): thickness=0.20 m, conductivity=1.31 W/m-K, density=2240 kg/m3, specific_heat=900 J/kg-K, roughness=MediumRough.
- Mat_Roof_Insulation (no-mass material): thermal_resistance=3.5 m2-K/W, roughness=MediumRough.
- Mat_Floor_Concrete (standard material): thickness=0.15 m, conductivity=1.95 W/m-K, density=2240 kg/m3, specific_heat=900 J/kg-K, roughness=MediumRough.
- Mat_Window_Glazing (simple glazing material): u_factor=2.7 W/m2-K, solar_heat_gain_coefficient=0.40, visible_transmittance=0.60.
schedule_specs:
Define five Schedule:Compact entries plus the necessary ScheduleTypeLimits. Schedule type limits required:
- Sched_Type_Fraction: lower=0.0, upper=1.0, numeric_type=Continuous, unit_type=Dimensionless.
- Sched_Type_Temperature: lower=-60.0, upper=200.0, numeric_type=Continuous, unit_type=Temperature.
- Sched_Type_Activity: lower=0.0, upper=1000.0, numeric_type=Continuous, unit_type=ActivityLevel.
- Sched_Type_OnOff: lower=0.0, upper=1.0, numeric_type=Discrete, unit_type=Dimensionless.

Schedule:Compact definitions:
- Sched_HVAC_Avail (uses Sched_Type_OnOff): Through 12/31, For AllDays, Until 24:00, value 1.0. Always available; ideal loads referenced by the hvac thermostat draws on this.
- Sched_Heating_Setpoint (uses Sched_Type_Temperature): Through 12/31, For Weekdays, Until 07:00 value 18.0, Until 18:00 value 21.0, Until 24:00 value 18.0; For Weekends, Until 24:00 value 18.0.
- Sched_Cooling_Setpoint (uses Sched_Type_Temperature): Through 12/31, For Weekdays, Until 07:00 value 28.0, Until 18:00 value 24.0, Until 24:00 value 28.0; For Weekends, Until 24:00 value 28.0.
- Sched_Office_Occupancy (uses Sched_Type_Fraction): Through 12/31, For Weekdays, Until 07:00 value 0.0, Until 08:00 value 0.2, Until 12:00 value 0.95, Until 13:00 value 0.5, Until 17:00 value 0.95, Until 18:00 value 0.3, Until 24:00 value 0.05; For Weekends, Until 24:00 value 0.0.
- Sched_Office_Activity (uses Sched_Type_Activity): Through 12/31, For AllDays, Until 24:00, value 120.0 (W per person, seated light office work).
- Sched_Office_Lighting (uses Sched_Type_Fraction): Through 12/31, For Weekdays, Until 07:00 value 0.05, Until 08:00 value 0.3, Until 18:00 value 0.9, Until 20:00 value 0.3, Until 24:00 value 0.05; For Weekends, Until 24:00 value 0.05.
construction_specs:
Define five constructions; each construction lists its layers from outermost layer to innermost layer:
- Cons_ExtWall: layers = Mat_ExtWall_Concrete, Mat_ExtWall_Insulation, Mat_IntWall_Gypsum. Used for every exterior vertical wall.
- Cons_IntWall: layers = Mat_IntWall_Gypsum, Mat_IntWall_Gypsum. Used for every interior partition wall (zone-to-zone within the same floor).
- Cons_Roof: layers = Mat_Roof_Concrete, Mat_Roof_Insulation. Used for the F3 ceiling that is exposed to outdoor.
- Cons_Floor_Ground: layers = Mat_Floor_Concrete. Used for the F1 floor that contacts the ground.
- Cons_InterFloor: layers = Mat_Floor_Concrete, Mat_IntWall_Gypsum. Used for every InterZone surface between vertically stacked zones (F1 ceiling / F2 floor and F2 ceiling / F3 floor); apply the same construction on both the upper-zone floor and the lower-zone ceiling.
- Cons_Window: a single-layer construction with layer = Mat_Window_Glazing. Used for every FenestrationSurface:Detailed window.
surface_specs:
For every zone build the four side walls plus floor and ceiling. The outer envelope follows: a wall along y=0 faces south, a wall along y=8 faces north, a wall along x=0 faces west, a wall along x=15 faces east. Shared partitions between two zones must be created exactly once as a Surface pair using Outside Boundary Condition Object referencing the matched partner. Use Cons_ExtWall for exterior vertical walls, Cons_IntWall for interior vertical partitions, Cons_Floor_Ground for F1 floors (Outside Boundary Condition = Ground), Cons_Roof for F3 ceilings (Outside Boundary Condition = Outdoors, Sun Exposed, Wind Exposed), and Cons_InterFloor for every InterZone ceiling/floor split piece. Window sub-surfaces are not surfaces here; they are listed in fenestration_specs.

Floor 1 same-floor adjacency (per zone, every side resolved):
- Zone_F1_S1: south wall (y=0, x[0,5]) exterior; west wall (x=0, y[0,3]) exterior; east wall (x=5, y[0,3]) interior partner Zone_F1_S2 west wall; north wall (y=3, x[0,5]) interior partner Zone_F1_COR south wall split piece x[0,5].
- Zone_F1_S2: south wall (y=0, x[5,10]) exterior; west wall (x=5, y[0,3]) interior partner Zone_F1_S1 east wall; east wall (x=10, y[0,3]) interior partner Zone_F1_S3 west wall; north wall (y=3, x[5,10]) interior partner Zone_F1_COR south wall split piece x[5,10].
- Zone_F1_S3: south wall (y=0, x[10,15]) exterior; west wall (x=10, y[0,3]) interior partner Zone_F1_S2 east wall; east wall (x=15, y[0,3]) exterior; north wall (y=3, x[10,15]) interior partner Zone_F1_COR south wall split piece x[10,15].
- Zone_F1_COR: south wall (y=3) split into three pieces — x[0,5] partner Zone_F1_S1 north, x[5,10] partner Zone_F1_S2 north, x[10,15] partner Zone_F1_S3 north; north wall (y=5) split into three pieces — x[0,5] partner Zone_F1_N1 south, x[5,10] partner Zone_F1_N2 south, x[10,15] partner Zone_F1_N3 south; west wall (x=0, y[3,5]) exterior; east wall (x=15, y[3,5]) exterior.
- Zone_F1_N1: north wall (y=8, x[0,5]) exterior; west wall (x=0, y[5,8]) exterior; east wall (x=5, y[5,8]) interior partner Zone_F1_N2 west wall; south wall (y=5, x[0,5]) interior partner Zone_F1_COR north wall split piece x[0,5].
- Zone_F1_N2: north wall (y=8, x[5,10]) exterior; west wall (x=5, y[5,8]) interior partner Zone_F1_N1 east wall; east wall (x=10, y[5,8]) interior partner Zone_F1_N3 west wall; south wall (y=5, x[5,10]) interior partner Zone_F1_COR north wall split piece x[5,10].
- Zone_F1_N3: north wall (y=8, x[10,15]) exterior; west wall (x=10, y[5,8]) interior partner Zone_F1_N2 east wall; east wall (x=15, y[5,8]) exterior; south wall (y=5, x[10,15]) interior partner Zone_F1_COR north wall split piece x[10,15].

Floor 2 same-floor adjacency:
- Zone_F2_S1: south wall (y=0, x[0,5]) exterior; west wall (x=0, y[0,3]) exterior; east wall (x=5, y[0,3]) interior partner Zone_F2_S2 west wall; north wall (y=3, x[0,5]) interior partner Zone_F2_COR south wall split piece x[0,5].
- Zone_F2_S2: south wall (y=0, x[5,10]) exterior; west wall (x=5, y[0,3]) interior partner Zone_F2_S1 east wall; east wall (x=10, y[0,3]) interior partner Zone_F2_S3 west wall; north wall (y=3, x[5,10]) interior partner Zone_F2_COR south wall split piece x[5,10].
- Zone_F2_S3: south wall (y=0, x[10,15]) exterior; west wall (x=10, y[0,3]) interior partner Zone_F2_S2 east wall; east wall (x=15, y[0,3]) exterior; north wall (y=3, x[10,15]) interior partner Zone_F2_COR south wall split piece x[10,15].
- Zone_F2_COR: south wall (y=3) split into three pieces — x[0,5] partner Zone_F2_S1 north, x[5,10] partner Zone_F2_S2 north, x[10,15] partner Zone_F2_S3 north; north wall (y=5) split into four pieces — x[0,3.75] partner Zone_F2_N1 south, x[3.75,7.5] partner Zone_F2_N2 south, x[7.5,11.25] partner Zone_F2_N3 south, x[11.25,15] partner Zone_F2_N4 south; west wall (x=0, y[3,5]) exterior; east wall (x=15, y[3,5]) exterior.
- Zone_F2_N1: north wall (y=8, x[0,3.75]) exterior; west wall (x=0, y[5,8]) exterior; east wall (x=3.75, y[5,8]) interior partner Zone_F2_N2 west wall; south wall (y=5, x[0,3.75]) interior partner Zone_F2_COR north wall split piece x[0,3.75].
- Zone_F2_N2: north wall (y=8, x[3.75,7.5]) exterior; west wall (x=3.75, y[5,8]) interior partner Zone_F2_N1 east wall; east wall (x=7.5, y[5,8]) interior partner Zone_F2_N3 west wall; south wall (y=5, x[3.75,7.5]) interior partner Zone_F2_COR north wall split piece x[3.75,7.5].
- Zone_F2_N3: north wall (y=8, x[7.5,11.25]) exterior; west wall (x=7.5, y[5,8]) interior partner Zone_F2_N2 east wall; east wall (x=11.25, y[5,8]) interior partner Zone_F2_N4 west wall; south wall (y=5, x[7.5,11.25]) interior partner Zone_F2_COR north wall split piece x[7.5,11.25].
- Zone_F2_N4: north wall (y=8, x[11.25,15]) exterior; west wall (x=11.25, y[5,8]) interior partner Zone_F2_N3 east wall; east wall (x=15, y[5,8]) exterior; south wall (y=5, x[11.25,15]) interior partner Zone_F2_COR north wall split piece x[11.25,15].

Floor 3 same-floor adjacency:
- Zone_F3_S1: south wall (y=0, x[0,7.5]) exterior; west wall (x=0, y[0,3]) exterior; east wall (x=7.5, y[0,3]) interior partner Zone_F3_S2 west wall; north wall (y=3, x[0,7.5]) interior partner Zone_F3_COR south wall split piece x[0,7.5].
- Zone_F3_S2: south wall (y=0, x[7.5,15]) exterior; west wall (x=7.5, y[0,3]) interior partner Zone_F3_S1 east wall; east wall (x=15, y[0,3]) exterior; north wall (y=3, x[7.5,15]) interior partner Zone_F3_COR south wall split piece x[7.5,15].
- Zone_F3_COR: south wall (y=3) split into two pieces — x[0,7.5] partner Zone_F3_S1 north, x[7.5,15] partner Zone_F3_S2 north; north wall (y=5, single piece x[0,15]) interior partner Zone_F3_N1 south wall; west wall (x=0, y[3,5]) exterior; east wall (x=15, y[3,5]) exterior.
- Zone_F3_N1: north wall (y=8, x[0,15]) exterior; west wall (x=0, y[5,8]) exterior; east wall (x=15, y[5,8]) exterior; south wall (y=5, single piece x[0,15]) interior partner Zone_F3_COR north wall.

Ground floors (F1) — every F1 zone floor is Outside Boundary Condition = Ground, Construction = Cons_Floor_Ground:
- Zone_F1_S1 floor, Zone_F1_S2 floor, Zone_F1_S3 floor, Zone_F1_COR floor, Zone_F1_N1 floor, Zone_F1_N2 floor, Zone_F1_N3 floor.

Roof (F3) — every F3 zone ceiling is Outside Boundary Condition = Outdoors with Sun Exposed and Wind Exposed, Construction = Cons_Roof:
- Zone_F3_S1 roof, Zone_F3_S2 roof, Zone_F3_COR roof, Zone_F3_N1 roof.

InterZone ceiling/floor pairings (F1 ceiling pairs with F2 floor). Each piece below produces one ceiling surface on the lower zone and one floor surface on the upper zone, both using Cons_InterFloor and referencing each other via Outside Boundary Condition Object:
- Zone_F1_S1 ceiling x in [0.00, 5.00], y in [0.00, 3.00] pairs Zone_F2_S1 floor (full overlap).
- Zone_F1_S2 ceiling x in [5.00, 10.00], y in [0.00, 3.00] pairs Zone_F2_S2 floor (full overlap).
- Zone_F1_S3 ceiling x in [10.00, 15.00], y in [0.00, 3.00] pairs Zone_F2_S3 floor (full overlap).
- Zone_F1_COR ceiling x in [0.00, 15.00], y in [3.00, 5.00] pairs Zone_F2_COR floor (full overlap).
- Zone_F1_N1 ceiling split: piece x in [0.00, 3.75], y in [5.00, 8.00] pairs Zone_F2_N1 floor; piece x in [3.75, 5.00], y in [5.00, 8.00] pairs Zone_F2_N2 floor.
- Zone_F1_N2 ceiling split: piece x in [5.00, 7.50], y in [5.00, 8.00] pairs Zone_F2_N2 floor; piece x in [7.50, 10.00], y in [5.00, 8.00] pairs Zone_F2_N3 floor.
- Zone_F1_N3 ceiling split: piece x in [10.00, 11.25], y in [5.00, 8.00] pairs Zone_F2_N3 floor; piece x in [11.25, 15.00], y in [5.00, 8.00] pairs Zone_F2_N4 floor.

InterZone ceiling/floor pairings (F2 ceiling pairs with F3 floor):
- Zone_F2_S1 ceiling x in [0.00, 5.00], y in [0.00, 3.00] pairs Zone_F3_S1 floor (fully inside F3_S1 footprint x[0,7.5]).
- Zone_F2_S2 ceiling split: piece x in [5.00, 7.50], y in [0.00, 3.00] pairs Zone_F3_S1 floor; piece x in [7.50, 10.00], y in [0.00, 3.00] pairs Zone_F3_S2 floor.
- Zone_F2_S3 ceiling x in [10.00, 15.00], y in [0.00, 3.00] pairs Zone_F3_S2 floor (fully inside F3_S2 footprint x[7.5,15]).
- Zone_F2_COR ceiling x in [0.00, 15.00], y in [3.00, 5.00] pairs Zone_F3_COR floor (full overlap).
- Zone_F2_N1 ceiling x in [0.00, 3.75], y in [5.00, 8.00] pairs Zone_F3_N1 floor.
- Zone_F2_N2 ceiling x in [3.75, 7.50], y in [5.00, 8.00] pairs Zone_F3_N1 floor.
- Zone_F2_N3 ceiling x in [7.50, 11.25], y in [5.00, 8.00] pairs Zone_F3_N1 floor.
- Zone_F2_N4 ceiling x in [11.25, 15.00], y in [5.00, 8.00] pairs Zone_F3_N1 floor.

No InterZone surface is left unpaired and no piece is omitted.
fenestration_specs:
Sixteen window instances total. Every record below states floor, parent zone, facade direction, parent wall side per the Wall_1=South / Wall_2=East / Wall_3=North / Wall_4=West mapping, facade plane in absolute world coords, horizontal span along the facade (x for south/north, y for east/west) in absolute world coords, and absolute world z_min and z_max with z_floor already added in. All windows use construction Cons_Window. Facades that are blank receive zero windows.

Facade window-chain inventory used below:
- South facade (y=0): F1 row has 3 windows at x in [1.40, 3.80], [6.30, 8.70], [11.20, 13.60] with sill_height=1.00 m, window_height=1.80 m, top_gap=0.80 m. F2 row has 3 windows at the same x ranges with sill_height=1.00, window_height=1.80, top_gap=0.80. F3 row is blank.
- North facade (y=8): F1 row has 3 windows at x in [1.40, 3.80], [6.30, 8.70], [11.20, 13.60] with sill=1.00, win=1.80, top=0.80. F2 row has 4 windows at x in [1.40, 3.15], [4.80, 6.55], [8.45, 10.20], [11.85, 13.60] with sill=1.00, win=1.80, top=0.80. F3 row has 1 large window at x in [1.40, 13.60] with sill=1.00, window_height=2.60, top_gap=1.20.
- East facade (x=15): F1 blank, F2 blank. F3 has 1 window with horizontal span along y at y in [3.50, 4.50] (1.00 m wide), sill=1.00, window_height=2.40, top_gap=1.40.
- West facade (x=0): F1 blank, F2 blank. F3 has 1 window with horizontal span along y at y in [3.50, 4.50], sill=1.00, window_height=2.40, top_gap=1.40.

Window records:
- Window_F1_S1_01: floor 1, parent zone Zone_F1_S1, facade South, parent wall side Wall_1, facade plane y=0.00, horizontal span x in [1.40, 3.80], absolute z_min=1.00, z_max=2.80, construction Cons_Window.
- Window_F1_S2_01: floor 1, parent zone Zone_F1_S2, facade South, parent wall side Wall_1, facade plane y=0.00, horizontal span x in [6.30, 8.70], absolute z_min=1.00, z_max=2.80, construction Cons_Window.
- Window_F1_S3_01: floor 1, parent zone Zone_F1_S3, facade South, parent wall side Wall_1, facade plane y=0.00, horizontal span x in [11.20, 13.60], absolute z_min=1.00, z_max=2.80, construction Cons_Window.
- Window_F1_N1_01: floor 1, parent zone Zone_F1_N1, facade North, parent wall side Wall_3, facade plane y=8.00, horizontal span x in [1.40, 3.80], absolute z_min=1.00, z_max=2.80, construction Cons_Window.
- Window_F1_N2_01: floor 1, parent zone Zone_F1_N2, facade North, parent wall side Wall_3, facade plane y=8.00, horizontal span x in [6.30, 8.70], absolute z_min=1.00, z_max=2.80, construction Cons_Window.
- Window_F1_N3_01: floor 1, parent zone Zone_F1_N3, facade North, parent wall side Wall_3, facade plane y=8.00, horizontal span x in [11.20, 13.60], absolute z_min=1.00, z_max=2.80, construction Cons_Window.
- Window_F2_S1_01: floor 2, parent zone Zone_F2_S1, facade South, parent wall side Wall_1, facade plane y=0.00, horizontal span x in [1.40, 3.80], absolute z_min=4.60, z_max=6.40, construction Cons_Window.
- Window_F2_S2_01: floor 2, parent zone Zone_F2_S2, facade South, parent wall side Wall_1, facade plane y=0.00, horizontal span x in [6.30, 8.70], absolute z_min=4.60, z_max=6.40, construction Cons_Window.
- Window_F2_S3_01: floor 2, parent zone Zone_F2_S3, facade South, parent wall side Wall_1, facade plane y=0.00, horizontal span x in [11.20, 13.60], absolute z_min=4.60, z_max=6.40, construction Cons_Window.
- Window_F2_N1_01: floor 2, parent zone Zone_F2_N1, facade North, parent wall side Wall_3, facade plane y=8.00, horizontal span x in [1.40, 3.15], absolute z_min=4.60, z_max=6.40, construction Cons_Window.
- Window_F2_N2_01: floor 2, parent zone Zone_F2_N2, facade North, parent wall side Wall_3, facade plane y=8.00, horizontal span x in [4.80, 6.55], absolute z_min=4.60, z_max=6.40, construction Cons_Window.
- Window_F2_N3_01: floor 2, parent zone Zone_F2_N3, facade North, parent wall side Wall_3, facade plane y=8.00, horizontal span x in [8.45, 10.20], absolute z_min=4.60, z_max=6.40, construction Cons_Window.
- Window_F2_N4_01: floor 2, parent zone Zone_F2_N4, facade North, parent wall side Wall_3, facade plane y=8.00, horizontal span x in [11.85, 13.60], absolute z_min=4.60, z_max=6.40, construction Cons_Window.
- Window_F3_N1_01: floor 3, parent zone Zone_F3_N1, facade North, parent wall side Wall_3, facade plane y=8.00, horizontal span x in [1.40, 13.60], absolute z_min=8.20, z_max=10.80, construction Cons_Window.
- Window_F3_COR_E_01: floor 3, parent zone Zone_F3_COR, facade East, parent wall side Wall_2, facade plane x=15.00, horizontal span y in [3.50, 4.50], absolute z_min=8.20, z_max=9.60, construction Cons_Window. The east corridor wall is exterior because the F3 corridor spans the full footprint width and reaches x=15.
- Window_F3_COR_W_01: floor 3, parent zone Zone_F3_COR, facade West, parent wall side Wall_4, facade plane x=0.00, horizontal span y in [3.50, 4.50], absolute z_min=8.20, z_max=9.60, construction Cons_Window. The west corridor wall is exterior for the same reason.

Per-window self-check: every z_min is greater than or equal to the parent zone z_floor and every z_max is less than or equal to z_floor + ceiling_height. F1 windows lie inside [0.00, 3.60]; F2 windows lie inside [3.60, 7.20]; F3 north big window lies inside [7.20, 12.00] (top_gap 1.20 confirmed); F3 east/west windows lie inside [7.20, 12.00] (top_gap 1.40 confirmed). South F3, east F1, east F2, west F1, west F2 are blank facades and receive zero windows.
hvac_specs:
Provide one ZoneHVAC:IdealLoadsAirSystem per thermal zone, plus one matching ZoneControl:Thermostat using ThermostatSetpoint:DualSetpoint per thermal zone. All ideal loads systems use Sched_HVAC_Avail as the availability schedule. All thermostats reference Sched_Heating_Setpoint as the heating setpoint schedule and Sched_Cooling_Setpoint as the cooling setpoint schedule. Apply this pair to every one of the 19 zones below:
- Zone_F1_S1, Zone_F1_S2, Zone_F1_S3, Zone_F1_COR, Zone_F1_N1, Zone_F1_N2, Zone_F1_N3,
- Zone_F2_S1, Zone_F2_S2, Zone_F2_S3, Zone_F2_COR, Zone_F2_N1, Zone_F2_N2, Zone_F2_N3, Zone_F2_N4,
- Zone_F3_S1, Zone_F3_S2, Zone_F3_COR, Zone_F3_N1.
Use default ideal loads parameters: heating supply air temperature 50 C, cooling supply air temperature 13 C, no humidity control, autosize for capacities, no outdoor air requirement at the ideal loads object (treat ventilation as bundled into the load).
people_specs:
Add one People object per office or corridor zone. Office zones (15 zones) use occupant density 0.10 people per m2; corridor zones (3 zones) use 0.02 people per m2. All People objects reference Sched_Office_Occupancy as the Number of People Schedule Name and Sched_Office_Activity as the Activity Level Schedule Name. Fraction Radiant 0.3, Sensible Heat Fraction Autocalculate, Carbon Dioxide Generation Rate 3.82e-8 m3/s-W.

Per-zone assignment with computed number of people (rounded to one decimal):
- Zone_F1_S1 area 15.00 m2, 1.5 people. Zone_F1_S2 area 15.00 m2, 1.5 people. Zone_F1_S3 area 15.00 m2, 1.5 people. Zone_F1_COR area 30.00 m2, 0.6 people. Zone_F1_N1 area 15.00 m2, 1.5 people. Zone_F1_N2 area 15.00 m2, 1.5 people. Zone_F1_N3 area 15.00 m2, 1.5 people.
- Zone_F2_S1 area 15.00 m2, 1.5 people. Zone_F2_S2 area 15.00 m2, 1.5 people. Zone_F2_S3 area 15.00 m2, 1.5 people. Zone_F2_COR area 30.00 m2, 0.6 people. Zone_F2_N1 area 11.25 m2, 1.1 people. Zone_F2_N2 area 11.25 m2, 1.1 people. Zone_F2_N3 area 11.25 m2, 1.1 people. Zone_F2_N4 area 11.25 m2, 1.1 people.
- Zone_F3_S1 area 22.50 m2, 2.3 people. Zone_F3_S2 area 22.50 m2, 2.3 people. Zone_F3_COR area 30.00 m2, 0.6 people. Zone_F3_N1 area 45.00 m2, 4.5 people.
lights_specs:
Add one Lights object per thermal zone. All Lights objects reference Sched_Office_Lighting as the schedule, Design Level Calculation Method Watts/Area. Office zones (15 zones) use 10.0 W/m2; corridor zones (3 zones) use 5.0 W/m2. Use Fraction Radiant 0.7, Fraction Visible 0.2, Fraction Replaceable 1.0, Return Air Fraction 0.0.

Per-zone assignment (W/m2 then total wattage = area x density):
- Zone_F1_S1 10.0 W/m2 over 15.00 m2 = 150 W. Zone_F1_S2 10.0 W/m2 over 15.00 m2 = 150 W. Zone_F1_S3 10.0 W/m2 over 15.00 m2 = 150 W. Zone_F1_COR 5.0 W/m2 over 30.00 m2 = 150 W. Zone_F1_N1 10.0 W/m2 over 15.00 m2 = 150 W. Zone_F1_N2 10.0 W/m2 over 15.00 m2 = 150 W. Zone_F1_N3 10.0 W/m2 over 15.00 m2 = 150 W.
- Zone_F2_S1 10.0 W/m2 over 15.00 m2 = 150 W. Zone_F2_S2 10.0 W/m2 over 15.00 m2 = 150 W. Zone_F2_S3 10.0 W/m2 over 15.00 m2 = 150 W. Zone_F2_COR 5.0 W/m2 over 30.00 m2 = 150 W. Zone_F2_N1 10.0 W/m2 over 11.25 m2 = 112.5 W. Zone_F2_N2 10.0 W/m2 over 11.25 m2 = 112.5 W. Zone_F2_N3 10.0 W/m2 over 11.25 m2 = 112.5 W. Zone_F2_N4 10.0 W/m2 over 11.25 m2 = 112.5 W.
- Zone_F3_S1 10.0 W/m2 over 22.50 m2 = 225 W. Zone_F3_S2 10.0 W/m2 over 22.50 m2 = 225 W. Zone_F3_COR 5.0 W/m2 over 30.00 m2 = 150 W. Zone_F3_N1 10.0 W/m2 over 45.00 m2 = 450 W.
